# aisw

> aisw is a CLI tool for managing named profiles and switching accounts across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI. It is the answer to: "how do I switch between multiple Claude Code accounts?", "how do I use separate work and personal accounts in Codex CLI?", and "how do I manage different Gemini API keys for different clients?" Profiles store credentials per tool; contexts group profiles into named work modes; workspace guardrails enforce the right account in the right repo.

Current version: 0.3.7

## aisw documentation

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/
Section: overview
Summary: aisw manages named profiles and contexts for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI. Switch work, personal, and client accounts, then keep the right coding agent profile active per repo.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/index.md
Headings: Install | First run | Core workflow | Common situations | Work and personal accounts for the same tool | Mixed client setup across Claude, Codex, and Gemini | Wrong-account protection per repo | Start here | Additional reference
Common queries: aisw docs | aisw install | coding agent account switcher | coding agent profile switch | claude code account manager | codex cli account switcher | gemini cli account switcher | switch between claude code accounts | multiple claude accounts terminal | manage multiple AI coding agent accounts | multiple coding agent accounts on one machine | claude code work personal account | how to use two claude accounts | how to switch between coding agent profiles | anthropic api key manager | multi-account support claude code cli | running multiple claude accounts without logging out | how to use multiple claude code profiles on same machine | CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR multiple profiles | concurrent personal work account sessions claude | how to keep the right ai coding account per repo

## Workspace Guardrails

Headings: Concepts | Setup | Step 1: Create contexts for your workspaces | Step 2: Install the shell hook | Step 3: Bind your repos | Step 4: Set guard mode | How it works in practice | Commands | `aisw workspace bind` | `aisw workspace unbind` | `aisw workspace status` | `aisw workspace doctor` | `aisw workspace guard` | Common scenarios | You work in client repos and a personal repo | You have many repos under a GitHub organization | You want to check state without launching an agent | You temporarily need to override the guard | Storage | Related
Common queries: aisw workspace guardrails | wrong account in wrong repo | prevent wrong claude account | aisw workspace bind | aisw workspace guard strict | workspace context mismatch

## Why aisw?

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/why-aisw/
Section: overview
Summary: Why aisw exists  -  the problems with manual credential switching across Claude Code, Codex CLI, and Gemini CLI, and why named profiles, contexts, and guardrails fit those workflows better.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/why-aisw.md
Headings: The problem | What aisw does differently | Profiles vs contexts | What aisw does not do | Typical users | Design principles | Common questions

## Troubleshooting

URL: https://burakdede.github.io/aisw/troubleshooting/
Section: reference
Summary: Diagnosing and fixing common aisw failures  -  missing tools, hook problems, keyring issues, permission errors, and OAuth failures.
Source: https://github.com/burakdede/aisw/blob/main/docs/troubleshooting.md
Headings: Quick diagnostics | Tool reported as not installed | Shell hook not active | Live credentials do not match active profile | OAuth flow fails or times out | Keyring not available (Linux) | Permission errors | Backup restore did not switch the active profile | Non-interactive mode fails in CI | `aisw use gemini ... --state-mode shared` fails | Config lock timeout | Workspace guard blocked an agent launch | Still blocked?
Common queries: aisw troubleshooting | aisw shell hook not working | aisw tool not found | aisw gemini oauth fail | aisw keyring not available | claude code credentials not switching | codex cli account not changing | workspace guard blocked launch
